description: 15 clear mixed-department office scenarios — all 6 queues + Hands 1/2/3 (Set MX)

cases.title: Forgot Domain Password Cannot Login Laptop
cases.description: Forgot my Active Directory domain password and cannot login to Windows laptop. Self-service password reset portal says account not found. Need password reset to access email.

cases.title: Phishing Email Link Clicked Credentials Entered
cases.description: Security incident: clicked phishing email link and entered O365 username and password on fake Microsoft login page. Received suspicious login alert 10 minutes later.

cases.title: Floor Printer Paper Jam Red Light On
cases.description: HP LaserJet on 4th floor has paper jam. Red jam indicator light on, print jobs stuck in queue. Need help clearing jam to print contract documents.

cases.title: Cisco AnyConnect VPN Error 807
cases.description: Cisco AnyConnect VPN fails with Error 807 on Windows laptop from home. Cannot reach internal file server. Internet connection works normally.

cases.title: MySQL Primary Replica Replication Stopped
cases.description: MySQL replication stopped on reporting replica with error 1236 binlog position mismatch. Finance dashboards showing stale data since 4 AM.

cases.title: Microsoft Teams Desktop Keeps Crashing
cases.description: Microsoft Teams desktop app crashes within 30 seconds of opening on Windows 11. Teams web version works in browser. Reinstall did not fix issue.

cases.title: Laptop Fan Running Loud and Overheating
cases.description: Company laptop fan constantly at maximum speed and chassis very hot during normal email use. Thermal throttling warnings appearing. Laptop is 3 years old.

cases.title: Whitelist Vendor IP on Corporate Firewall
cases.description: Need firewall rule to whitelist vendor IP 203.0.113.45 for inbound HTTPS to staging API server. Vendor integration testing blocked since yesterday.

cases.title: New Contractor Okta and Jira Access
cases.description: New contractor starts Monday — need Okta SSO account, Jira project access, and VPN profile provisioned. Manager approval attached in onboarding ticket.

cases.title: Ransomware Encryption Detected on Shared Drive
cases.description: Security incident: multiple files on shared drive renamed with .encrypted extension. CrowdStrike alert triggered on file server FS-PROD-02. Need immediate isolation.

cases.title: Veeam Nightly Backup Job Failed Repository Full
cases.description: Veeam backup job failed at 1 AM — backup repository volume out of free space. Last successful full backup was 4 days ago. Need space recovery urgently.

cases.title: Google Chrome Shows Blank White Pages
cases.description: Google Chrome browser shows blank white page for all internal and external websites. Edge browser works fine on same laptop. Cleared cache but issue persists.

cases.title: External Monitor No Signal Through USB-C Dock
cases.description: Dell USB-C docking station — external monitor shows no signal when laptop connected. Laptop screen works, dock power LED green. Tried different HDMI cable.

cases.title: Conference Room Wi-Fi Authentication Fails
cases.description: Corporate Wi-Fi in Conference Room 7 rejects valid credentials with 'Authentication failed'. Same credentials work in open office area and on wired port.

cases.title: PostgreSQL Connection Pool Exhausted API Errors
cases.description: PostgreSQL connection pool exhausted on pg-app-prod-03. Customer-facing API returning HTTP 500 database connection errors. Pool size 100, all connections in use.
